module_goal: Daily bathing context, product usage, skin concerns, household dynamics, and water quality factors.

questions.question_text: How many times a day do you typically shower/bathe?

options.label: Less than once a day (not daily)

questions.question_text: Walk me through your typical bathing routine step by step. What products do you use and in what order?
questions.placeholder: Describe everything you do, step by step — include all products

questions.question_text: Do you currently use body wash, bar soap, or both? What drives that choice?
How would you describe your relationship with bathing/grooming?

options.label: Purely functional — just get clean and get out
A small daily pleasure — I enjoy it but don't overthink it
A proper self-care ritual — I take time, use multiple products
Depends on my mood — sometimes quick, sometimes indulgent

questions.question_text: What specific skin concerns, if any, do you have? Select all that apply.

options.label: Dryness (skin feels tight, flaky, or rough)
Acne or body acne (pimples on back, chest)
Sensitivity (skin gets red, itchy, or irritated)
None — my skin is generally fine

questions.question_text: Do other household members use the same body wash as you? Who decides what to buy?
How does your water quality affect your product choices, if at all?
Has your bathing routine changed in the last 2 years? If so, how and why?
questions.placeholder: Describe what changed and why, or if nothing changed
